what_changed: Rejected PreparedRequest values that do not carry a MaterializedKV payload.
Rejected non-PreparedRequest objects at AdmissionQueue.try_enqueue before mutating queue state.
Added focused admission queue tests for public input validation, budget enforcement, and FIFO pop behavior.
why: The admission queue is the serving handoff boundary before vLLM/SGLang integration. Explicitly validating prepared requests prevents malformed cache payloads or arbitrary objects from reaching pending GPU-memory accounting.
